title: Document history hook with fetch and version retrieval
purpose: Manages document change history fetching and version retrieval for a React component.

steps.content: Initialize state for history, loading status, and error.
Extract project and session from the current session.
Define async function to fetch document history from the API.
Define async function to retrieve document version at a specific timestamp.
Trigger history fetch on component mount and when document ID changes.
Return history state and utility functions for refetching and version retrieval.
IF document ID, project, or session are missing, clear history and return.
Set loading state to true and clear any previous error.
Construct URL parameters with project and session.
Fetch document history from the API endpoint.
IF the response status is 404, set history to null.
IF the response is successful, parse and set the history data.
IF the response fails, set an error message.
IF a network error occurs, set a network error message.
Reset loading state after the fetch attempt.
IF document ID, project, or session are missing, return null.
Construct URL parameters with project, session, and timestamp.
Fetch document version from the API endpoint.
IF the response is successful, parse and return the content.
IF the response fails, ignore the error and return null.
